theme_notes: Iran retaliates against US bases across Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar, Jordan, and Oman as Trump declares the ceasefire over at NATO; FIFA 2026 World Cup QFs deliver Argentina past Switzerland and England past Norway; Linda Nosková wins the Wimbledon ladies' singles title.
settled: Zero balance. More stable than the Iran-US situation right now.
Argentina through. England through. You two through. World Cup Sunday delivered.
Clean. Linda Nosková won Wimbledon today. Books also won. Great Sunday.
youOwe: Less than a Wimbledon strawberry and cream. Still outstanding. Still embarrassing.
Switzerland gave Argentina everything and still went home. You give nothing and stay.
Iran launched counterstrike operations across five countries. You launched 'I'll Venmo you'.
England beat Norway 2-1. Clean finish. Try that energy on this debt.
Enough for a Wimbledon souvenir and nothing else. The math isn't mathing.
Trump cancelled the Iran ceasefire at NATO. Your payment window is also closing.
Linda Nosková beat her own compatriot to win Wimbledon. No sentiment. You have no excuse.
Iran hit Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar, Jordan, and Oman in one day. You can manage one Venmo.
Argentina squeezed past Switzerland in extra time. Your partner is also playing extra time.
The USMCA is being scrapped after years of stability. Faster than your repayment timeline.
England is in the World Cup semis. Your finances are in a different tournament entirely.
Sweden fined Google $1.5 billion today. You are also exhibiting anticompetitive behavior.
Trump is scrapping the USMCA. Your partner is considering scrapping this arrangement too.
Linda Nosková won Wimbledon without a wild card or sympathy. Neither will arrive for you.
England just booked a World Cup semi. Your bank account just booked an overdraft. Big week.
Iran retaliated across the entire Middle East today. Your partner is studying the playbook.
This is 'World Cup host city investment' money. It is somehow trapped in your pocket.
Trump cancelled two international agreements this week. This is just the third.
theyOwe: Less than a Wimbledon towel. More than they've offered. Chase it anyway.
England scored twice today. Your money hasn't scored once. Embarrassing.
Smaller than a World Cup match ball. Bigger than their effort to return it.
Switzerland fought to the 112th minute and still lost. You've fought less, gained less.
Under $200 and they act like it's beneath them. That tracks.
The World Cup QFs had four goals today. You've scored zero on getting paid back.
That's Wimbledon final weekend hotel money they're sitting on. It's yours.
Argentina won the quarterfinal on guts alone. Collect this on guts alone.
The US and Iran are at war. Sweden is suing Big Tech. You have one simpler problem. Handle it.
Linda Nosková won Wimbledon today. She settled it faster than they've settled this.
England and Argentina both made the semis today. This debt made nothing. Embarrassing.
The Iran ceasefire lasted under a week. Your grace period lasted under a month. Same energy.
Ro Khanna got detained in the West Bank today. Your partner has your money similarly detained.
This is approaching Wimbledon prize money territory. They're spending it like it's theirs.
The Philippines got upgraded to upper-middle-income today. This friendship got downgraded.
Wimbledon over. World Cup QFs done. Ceasefire collapsed. Collect before the semis.
Trump scrapped the Iran ceasefire and the USMCA this week. Your friendship is next on the list.
At this level it's not a debt. It's a bilateral incident. Your partner is calling a summit.
